name: The Emberwatch
inspire: After an Action step, if a friendly fighter began that Action step in enemy territory and used a Core ability, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Alone I Stand!
reactions.trigger: You can use this in the last Power step of a battle round.
reactions.flavorText: The Emberwatch have been in the mines of Embergard so long that the emberstone causes their tempers to fray easily, and so they value a little distance now and then.
reactions.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter that is in a different territory to each other friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex. That push cannot end adjacent to another friendly fighter. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: Vanguard Dash
abilities.flavorText: The Emberwatch effortlessly reposition themselves in battle.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a friendly fighter. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty edge hex. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: Deadly Sentries
abilities.flavorText: Tasked to keep the mines of Embergard free of trespassers, the Emberwatch employ ranged weaponry to ensure transgressors are brought to swift justice.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has +1 Range for that Attack. This ability can only be used once per game.

abilities.name: The Raptors of Sigmar
abilities.flavorText: Few indeed escape the wrath of these noble warriors, and those that do are lucky beyond measure.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target is vulnerable. Inflict 1 damage on the target. This ability can only be used once per game.
